title: Instantly Bed
description: When you sleep, the night passes instantly.
body:
![BANNER](https://i.imgur.com/qrDnnkp.png) [![OTHER PROJECTS](https://img.shields.io/badge/DATAPACK%20ONLY-00af5c?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=gray)](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyrianow) [![DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/MORE%20HELP/BUG%20OR%20OTHERS-5865f2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&labelColor=gray)](https://discord.gg/qabbadeptc) # **Instantly Bed** is a simply **datapack** :
- BEFORE > When you were sleeping it took several long seconds! - AFTER > When you sleep it only takes 1 second.
Video presentation
# ### To update please follow the following steps : - 1 - Look at the current version that is on your world/server with the command `/function instantly_bed:load`. - 2 - Check here for the latest version available. - 2.1 - If you have the latest one, no need to change. - 2.2 - If it has a newer version do step 3. - 3 - Close your server/world (To avoid any problems especially if you have other datapack/mod) - 4 - Delete the old datapack to put the most recent ones in it. - 5 - Restart your server/world and play!
